meta.name: Sigil Core — LOLBin (Unix / GTFOBins)
meta.author: NOMARJ <hello@sigilsec.ai>
meta.description: Detects abuse of legitimate Unix binaries (living-off-the-land) for shell breakout, file read/write, and exfiltration. Generated from GTFOBins (https://github.com/GTFOBins/GTFOBins.github.io@master acd524623f9c, retrieved 2026-06-22, GPL-3.0-or-later (see upstream LICENSE)).

rules.description: GTFOBins LOLBin abuse: 7z (file-read) — living-off-the-land binary execution/exfil
GTFOBins LOLBin abuse: R (shell) — living-off-the-land binary execution/exfil
GTFOBins LOLBin abuse: aa-exec (shell) — living-off-the-land binary execution/exfil
